'''Drudonna''' was a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] covered in [[Water/Legends|ice]] with a 2.5-[[Kilometer/Legends|kilometer]] diameter. It was one of the two largest moons orbiting the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]].

==Characteristics==
Drudonna and its larger sister moon [[H'gaard]] were known together as "The Twins." Both were unremarkable ice satellites, and appeared as large, [[Color/Legends|green]] spheres in Bespin's night sky.

==History==
[[Shirmar Base]], a staging area and processing center for [[Ugnaught/Legends|Ugnaught]] expeditions into [[Velser's Ring/Legends|Velser's Ring]], was located on Drudonna.

{{Moon-stub}}
